title: Verify loss aversion message appears when cancelling trial
description: Test that clicking cancel trial triggers the loss aversion exit gate with warning about losing remaining free days
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Manage Trial section
expected_result: Popup displays headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body text about losing remaining days, with 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action and 'Cancel Anyway' as secondary action
